draft_v1: {"schema_v":1,"recipe":{"title":"BASIC DRY PANCAKE MIX","description":"Why buy a store-bought mix when homemade pancakes are so easy and so much better? You can use this mix immediately after putting it together or, better yet, do what I do: make a quadruple batch and store it in an airtight container in the pantry. That way, whenever you want to whip up a batch of pancakes, all you've got to do is add your wet ingredients, and you're ready to roll."},"steps":[]}
